basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIHR Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 12 Junior Consultant, Young Professional Posts
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR)
basic_details.short_information: ICMR National Institute of Health Research (ICMR NIHR) Project Human Resource Positions Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the ICMR NIHR Project Human Resource Positions Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Age relaxation as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or BDS or BVSc or equivalent degree, Post Graduate degree in Life Science Subjects/Public Health, Post Graduate, B.com/BBA
qualification.details: Junior Consultant (Medical): Professionals having proven competency and success in their area of specialization, with at least 6 years of Post qualification experience and should possess minimum MBBS or BDS or BVSc or equivalent degree in relevant subject. Young Professional-I (Public Health): Post Graduate degree in Life Science Subjects/Public Health. Young Professional-II (IT): Post Graduate in Technology / IT / Computer Science with 3 year experience. Young Professional-I (Admin): Graduate in any discipline with minimum 55% marks, from a recognized University/ College. (With minimum one year of post qualification experience in relevant field/subject). Young Professional-I (Accounts): B.com/BBA (With minimum 55% Marks) from a recognized University/College. (With minimum one year of post qualification experience in relevant field/subject).

selection_process: Shortlisting based on educational qualification and experience Interview Document Verification
